title: Colourful Wolf Armour
description: This makes wolf armour(armor) fully dyed rather than parts of it.
body:
Need a server for you and your friends? click the image below:

[![](https://cdn.apexminecrafthosting.com/img/theme/apex-hosting-mobile.png)](https://billing.apexminecrafthosting.com/aff.php?aff=16230)

# Colour Wolf Armour
This resource packs changes the wolf armour from the mixure of Dyed and amadillo colours to just the dyed colour. This will make your dogs look 10x better.

![All Wolf Armour](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/445eb85dea67ef6a2b0246d260deb8468862485d.jpeg)
